name: Cheese and Weiner Crescents
recipeIngredient: 4 slices American cheese, cut into 6 strips each
1 can Pillsbury Refrigerated Crescent Dinner Rolls (8oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slit the wieners to within 1/2 inch of the ends.
2. Insert 3 strips of cheese in each slit.
3. Separate the dough into 8 triangles.
4. Wrap the dough over the wiener, keeping the cheese visible.
5. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet with the cheese side up.
6. Bake at 375°F for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
